programme.desc: Four women balance their dating adventures alongside their career ambitions at an upscale digital magazine. As the ladies navigate the ups and downs of modern dating, romance, exes and friendships, they learn what they really want out of life and love.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Secret Lives and Alibis
programme.desc: When Ann Huxley learns that her ex-husband has been found dead in the warehouse where he works, a deadly get-rich-quick scheme begins to unravel.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Deadly Double Life
programme.desc: Barry Odom wasn’t one to make enemies, but after he’s executed just outside his apartment complex, investigators uncover not one but two love triangles, leading them to the front door of a scorned lover who was willing to kill for love.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: When Rhoni Reuter, the pregnant girlfriend of Chicago Bears legend Shaun Gayle, is shot to death in her home, investigators are faced with a long list of romantic rivals as suspects.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Murderous Millionaire
programme.desc: After young mother and high-end escort Georgina Symonds goes missing, police discover one of her obsessed clients is responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Head Above Water
programme.desc: Disaster strikes as floods plague the region, and the Browns must balance the fate of their new community with the success of their homestead.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Call to Duty
programme.desc: Noah invents an ingenious device to rid their homesite of moles. Billy gives daughter Rain major responsibility as barn construction goes full bore at the ranch.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Smoke There's Fire
programme.desc: A wildlife fire threatens the completion of the barn. Ami and Billy have an important health update.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A New Beginning
programme.desc: The wolf pack braces for a looming wildfire that threatens completion of the barn. Noah walks down the aisle to become the first married Brown.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Clear and Pheasant Danger
programme.desc: The Browns take part in a competitive pheasant hunt as a way to celebrate and give thanks for everything they have.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Big Push
programme.desc: The Brown siblings struggle to finish their ambitious homesites as the ground begins to freeze. Later, the Wolfpack gets the call that Rhain-Alisha has gone into labor and races to the birth of baby Eli.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Very Bush Wedding
programme.desc: The wolfpack prepares for their first ever wedding in the bush. But as the family prepares to welcome a new member, emotions run high and the Browns struggle to keep their most ambitious project on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bear Meets Girl
programme.desc: When an ostrich lays its first egg, the Brown siblings rush to figure out how to incubate it. Bear gets a special visit from a girl on North Star Ranch as the family prepares for a surprise celebration for Billy and Ami's 40th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Noah's Animal Ark
programme.desc: The Browns flee the mountain during a dangerous lightning storm in the heat of fire season. To ensure their safety, they devise ingenious new fire safety measures, including a bush alert system and animal evacuation ark, which they put to the test.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Life in the Extreme
programme.desc: It's late fall and the Browns kickstart their ambitious cabin build. Bam and Gabe go on a deer hunt as the family scrambles to pull off an 'extreme' wedding on the mountain, but days before the ceremony, things take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rumble in the Bush
programme.desc: Gabe is attacked by an aggressive ostrich and loses one of his most prized possessions in the process. When the ranch gets hit with the first snowfall, the family builds a big bonfire to unfreeze the ground under their house site.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Range Ridin'
programme.desc: When the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters, Gabe takes it upon himself to learn to ride a horse as the family constructs a fence around the property. And later, Gabe and Raquell leave the mountain for the birth of their baby girl.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Entering Wild, Wild Country
programme.desc: Leaving comfortable lives behind, strangers journey to Alaska chasing dreams of an off-grid community. With only 100 days until winter, it's a race against nature. They immediately set off to hunt moose, but struggle against the elements and each other.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Tanker Inferno, Skier Wipeout
programme.desc: An oil tanker fire in a shipyard leads to massive explosions. A skier falls hundreds of feet down a mountain. A back draft explosion injures firefighters. A pilot crash-lands on an aircraft carrier, and a crane collapses, dropping its load onto a car.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Smallmouth in the Spring
programme.desc: Jeff Shaw is fishing with Jimmy in Sturgeon Bay, Wisconsin.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Permit and Tarpon
programme.desc: Fishing for permit and tarpon takes place in Belize.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Savage Ski Run, Crane Collapse
programme.desc: A crash on a ski run; two cranes collapse; a skateboarder crashes after catching some air and a daredevil takes on the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: Over the Rainbow
programme.desc: The Guyz fish the wrecks of Key West with Scotty Stoky. George and Lain visit the Key West Shipwreck Museum and eat at the Thirsty Mermaid.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Special Forces Green Beret - Greg Stube
programme.desc: Greg Stube was wounded during Operation Medusa in Afghanistan.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Miami - Offshore Live-Baiting
programme.desc: George is fishing Miami for dolphin, blackfin tuna and sailfish.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Sarasota Showdown
programme.desc: Capts. Rick and Ridge Murphy join Capt. Billy Alstrom on the Murphy's Law Contender to fish Florida's west coast reefs and wrecks.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: A Special Kind of Crazy
programme.desc: At his new dive site, The Chute, Dustin is overpowered by the raging white water leaving his life in his crew's hands. After heavy rain, Fred's crew fights zero visibility and have a deadly encounter 14 feet underwater.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Questions Asked
programme.desc: Fred discovers a promising new section of ground under the old Mayor's house. Parker's co-foreman Mitch is confronted with a family crisis. Rick turns to the King of Klondike to keep his operation running.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: Two survivalists test their primitive skills on the razor sharp terrain of Andros Island in the Bahamas. Battling starvation, swarms of tiny predators and accusations about a partner's survival abilities turns this partnership into a bad marriage.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Argentina Impossible
programme.desc: A survival instructor teams up with a pediatrician to fight storms, cold and starvation in Argentina's Yungas Cloud Forest. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before hypothermia shuts them down.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Of Love: Denied
programme.desc: It's feeling lonely deep in the Panamanian jungle when a former cop and a self-described wild child clash over cuddling before one succumbs to the wilderness and the other must forage, trap and kill in order to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Of Love: Love and Fights
programme.desc: It's love and fights on a Nicaraguan island when two survivalists try to survive 21 days with no food, water or clothes. They face challenges, like bull sharks and big cats, and the ultimate test of their skills to survive the dangerous conditions.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Holly's Story
programme.desc: Holly already has one failed weight loss surgery, so to succeed this time, she must do more than change her eating habits, she must address the childhood issues that continue to plague her.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lacey's Story
programme.desc: Lacey ballooned up over 600 lbs on pizza and ice cream and knows Dr. Now is her best hope for success. She must now rally her divorced parents around her for support and find a way to modulate her moods that won't include binge-eating.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Kenae's Journey
programme.desc: Kenae' was already big before her weight gain took off after the death of her beloved mother. Refusing to deal with the pain, Kenae' turned to food to fill the void. But she'll be reunited with her mom soon if the denial continues.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: There's Something About Jerry
programme.desc: Tammy's boyfriend, Jerry, comes to visit just in time to celebrate the sisters' favorite holiday: Halloween. Tammy's sister Misty, however, questions Jerry's intentions. Amy has to face another weigh-in after her concerning appointment with Dr. Procter.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Bettie Jo's Story
programme.desc: At just 24, Bettie Jo is eating her way towards 700 pounds. Housebound, she is reliant on her husband for even basic needs. Bettie Jo's future relies on her losing weight and her husband losing his fear that if she loses weight she will leave him.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: Find out which classic Joker’s lines are still being uttered and which of the Alma Mater’s gets mentioned. Plus, what inspired tonight’s punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Alliance
programme.desc: Find out which Joker is an avid photographer, and what words the guys never want to hear before filming a punishment. Plus, learn which Joker is never afraid to strip down for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Enter the Dragons
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's dad has appeared on the show, and which natural disaster affected one of the challenges. Plus, learn how Sal came to own a replica of Van Halen's guitar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sorry for Your Loss
programme.desc: Find out which Joker brought a kitten to the set, and who's responsible for the song used on the show. Plus, learn which instrument Q tried to master before the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Trouble Shoot
programme.desc: Find out why Murr is particular about the way labels face in grocery stores, how Sal always gets Joe to break character and who works out with a personal trainer.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cooking for Jeffrey: Dinner Party 101
programme.desc: Ina Garten is teaching Dinner Party 101 to her great friend, actress Debra Monk. The foolproof meal plan includes roast chicken with bread and arugula salad, a stunning easy cheese board, tri-berry crumbles and a table-setting tutorial.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cooking for Jeffrey: Deans for Dinner
programme.desc: Ina Garten's throwing a celebration meal for her friend Deborah Berke, who has been named the Dean of the Yale Architecture School. She's making a sensational paella salad, a platter of goat cheese, English oat crackers and fig preserves.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cooking for Jeffrey: Pizza Pronto
programme.desc: Ina Garten's husband, Jeffrey, takes a pizza making class and learns to make a white pizza, while Ina prepares a platter of arugula with prosciutto and burrata and a limoncello ricotta cheesecake to go with it.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cooking for Jeffrey: Back to School Surprise
programme.desc: Jeffrey is going back to school after a long vacation, so Ina Garten prepares an alfresco dinner of Moroccan grilled lamb chops, roasted vine tomatoes and couscous with pine nuts and mint.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cooking for Jeffrey: It Must Be Friday
programme.desc: It's Friday, which means Jeffrey's coming home and it's chicken for dinner. Ina shakes things up with skillet-roasted lemon chicken with roasted broccolini, then follows with raspberry rhubarb crostata with ice cream for dessert.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cooking for Jeffrey: Jeffrey's Birthday Dinner
programme.desc: Ina Garten throws an Italian-themed birthday dinner with a big surprise for Jeffrey. To get the party started, there's bruschetta with sauteed chard, followed by roasted Italian meatballs and an arugula and radicchio salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Speedy Sweets
programme.desc: Ree's sharing four delicious done-in-a-flash desserts, from a great White Chocolate Pudding that's a huge family favorite, to a fast and fabulous Raspberry Fool that's light, creamy and perfect for company.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Four Shades Of Chocolate
programme.desc: The most decadent chocolate treats from white chocolate all the way down to dark! There's white chocolate raspberry cheesecake, dipped and decorated waffle cones, milk chocolate mousse and, to top it all off, a chocolate orange.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Iron Anniversary
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is celebrating her sixth wedding anniversary with an epic dinner that includes the juiciest big t-bone steak, scalloped potatoes, charred broccolini with shishito pepper romesco and a marzipan moose mousse cake.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Date Night
programme.desc: It's date night on the farm! Molly Yeh makes a romantic dinner for husband Nick, including juicy steak salad with a bright za'atar chimichurri, the best cheesy garlic babka muffins and blood orange amaretto sours.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Galentine's Day
programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites her best girlfriends over to enjoy a chocolate-inspired dinner, starting with chipotle cocoa rubbed salmon. The menu also includes super decadent mac and cheese in a cream garlic sauce and cherry jam devil's food cake for dessert.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Double Date Dinner
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Kardea and her boyfriend Nassir have a double date dinner with their friends, Yolanda and Eugene. Kardea kicks off the night with a savory peppered skirt steak salad with crumbled blue.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Pour On Some Love
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are sharing delicious recipes for a saucy Valentine's Day meal. Jeff Mauro sears up steaks for Sunny Anderson's easy red wine peppercorn sauce and Geoffrey Zakarian's bearnaise sauce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Most-Searched Comforting Classics
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian makes savory Short Ribs; Jeff Mauro has two twists on Chicken Pot Pie. Katie Lee shares her Italian Style Meatloaf, and Keavy Landreth and Allison Kave from the bar Butter and Scotch show the perfect way to pair a cocktail with dessert.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grandma's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Four seasoned and spunky grandmothers show Guy Fieri how it's done! In the first round, the judges hand out samples that the chefs must include in a version of their grandkids' favorite dish.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Crash

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Ritchie Scores

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Endless Shrimp, Endless Night

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Let Him Eat Cake

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Sleepless in Mar Vista
programme.desc: After taking some new sleeping pills, Christine wakes up to discover she made several embarrassing phone calls while knocked out.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Undercover Brother
programme.desc: After sleeping with Richard's wildly attractive brother, Christine learns an astonishing secret.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Strange Bedfellows

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Older and Wiser
programme.desc: Wanting someone to watch after Sophia during the day, Dorothy gets Sophia a job under false pretenses. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose are all excited about being hired as models for a Penny Saver.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Melodrama
programme.desc: Blanche wants to intensify her relationship with her infamous one-night-stand-man, Mel Bushman. Meanwhile, Rose tries her hand at TV reporting. Her assignment: a dog show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Witness

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love for Sale
programme.desc: The girls prepare for the Children's Hospital Bachelorette Auction and a reluctant Dorothy decides to participate. She is in for a quick surprise when Stan walks in and begins bidding.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Valentine's Day

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Whose Face Is This, Anyway?

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's Prized Pupil

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Visit From Little Sven

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit
programme.desc: Dorothy is stunned to learn that Stan's tax problems are her tax problems since Stan is being audited for a number of years when they were still married. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose take a Spanish class, each for different reasons.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk
programme.desc: Mkhaya, the youngest baby elephant in the Safari Park herd, learns to use her trunk. Will Alba the Andean bear become a first-time mom? Zoo vets examine Mandazzi the gorilla, and Jeff the snake chaser looks for he elusive costal patch nose snake.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Miracle Calf
programme.desc: Southern white rhino Victoria is pregnant with a calf that could be a key in saving a species from extinction. Connor the Malayan tiger has tooth trouble. A new bird keeper learns to feed the shoebill. Polar bears use their hunting skills on live prey.

programme.title: The Zoo: Handle With Care

programme.desc: After months of training, Robert steps into his father's shoes to feed Graham, Australia Zoo's most notorious crocodile, solo, in front of the entire Crocoseum. Bindi witnesses one of nature's rarest events: Cedar the Koala has given birth to twins.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tiger Eyes
programme.desc: It's a big day for Hunter the Sumatran Tiger. He is blind and must be sedated for his annual eye check, allowing Terri to get closer than usual. The keepers prepare the young giraffe Scarlett for a road trip to South Australia, reuniting her with family.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi's Lemur Island
programme.desc: The Australia Zoo's Alligator Snapping Turtles need a health check, and it's Robert's job to protect from their fierce bites. Terri and Bindi welcome seven new Lemurs from the US. The Zoo's Rescue Unit is called to save possums caught in a chimney.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert, King of Cobras
programme.desc: Robert follows in Steve's steps wrangling Utah, a highly venomous 12-foot king cobra. Dr. Amber visits Tandora to care for wild Koalas. Back at the Zoo, an old injury flares up for Bruce the Brolga, a bird who's been in the Irwin's care for 26 years.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert & The Rattlesnakes
programme.desc: Robert wrangles Western Diamondback rattlesnakes in Arizona for the first time, learning techniques.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Irwin African Adventure

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Turtles Take Flight

programme.desc: When a rising star attorney in South Florida is murdered, police investigate whether her death is connected to a web of fraud, betrayal and more than $1 billion in missing money. Dennis Murphy reports.

programme.title: Dateline: A Cold December Morning
programme.desc: A family's loyalty is tested when a mother of five is found dead in her bedroom. Two suspects emerge: her ex-husband and someone else from her private life.

programme.title: Dateline: A Cold December Morning
programme.desc: A family's loyalty is tested when a mother of five is found dead in her bedroom. Two suspects emerge: her ex-husband and someone else from her private life.

programme.title: Dateline: A Texas Twist
programme.desc: A recent high school graduate is miraculously found alive after she and her friend are brutally attacked just outside Corpus Christi, Texas.

programme.title: Dateline: Frantic
programme.desc: 23-year-old Christina went to a high-end shopping mall on a Friday night and vanished. Police questioned everyone. The friends she was with. The ex-model boyfriend. Someone was lying. But who?

programme.title: Lovers' Lane Murders: No One Can Hear You Scream
programme.desc: After US Naval Academy graduate Cathy Thomas and her girlfriend Becky Dowski are murdered in a lovers' lane area on the Colonial Parkway in Virginia, authorities are left to wonder if this is a hate crime or the birth of something more ominous.

programme.title: Lovers' Lane Murders: Evil Strikes Again
programme.desc: With Cathy Thomas and Becky Dowski's Colonial Parkway homicide still unsolved, a new double murder less than a year later leaves law enforcement rattled. Are the slayings of David Knobling and Robin Edwards in another lovers' lane area connected?

programme.title: Lovers' Lane Murders: No Bodies, No Answers
programme.desc: An entire region is on edge after college students Cassandra Hailey and Keith Call go missing from a lovers' lane area in Northern Virginia. Is this third double homicide on the Colonial Parkway an unnerving coincidence or proof of a serial killer?

programme.title: Lovers' Lane Murders: A Portrait of Evil
programme.desc: When Annamaria Phelps and Daniel Lauer turn up dead in a lovers' lane area close to the Colonial Parkway in northern Virginia, many in law enforcement are convinced that this fourth double homicide in three years proves the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Cindy Reese
programme.desc: A small town church is stunned when a parishioner is murdered, in a stunning twist the suspect pool is drawn directly from the church walls.

programme.title: Snapped: Judith Singer
programme.desc: After a young California father is ambushed on the steps of his own home, Santa Clara detectives uncover a complex murder plot that ultimately leads them to an unexpected mastermind who's been hiding in plain sight all along.

programme.title: Snapped: Mary Bruno
programme.desc: The peaceful life of a retired North Carolina couple is shattered when a husband's body is found in his own garage, leaving investigators to sort out fact from fiction with the help of his wife.

programme.title: Snapped: Suze Adams
programme.desc: After a hardworking mother is trapped and killed in a California house fire, investigators sift through multiple theories to figure out who could have ignited the deadly blaze.

programme.title: Movie: Independence Day: Resurgence
programme.desc: Twenty years after the first invasion, a massive alien force invades Earth, following a distress signal sent by the original army. Blowing through Earth's new defenses, the invaders ravage the planet. It is up to a band of pilots to save the world.

programme.title: Movie: Skyscraper
programme.desc: A new skyscraper's head of security finds himself framed for the attack when an explosion starts a massive fire in the building. With his wife and child trapped in their condo hundreds of feet above the streets below, he desperately tries to reach them.

programme.title: Family Guy: Don't Be a Dickens at Christmas
programme.desc: A selfish Peter loses his Christmas spirit and is visited by ghosts of Christmas past, present and future who take him on a journey around Quahog in the style of Charles Dickens' 'A Christmas Carol.'

programme.title: Family Guy: Boy (Dog) Meets Girl (Dog)
programme.desc: At the vet's office, Brian meets a female show dog named Ellie. Smitten with her, he enters a show dog competition, in which the winner gets to breed with her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dog Bites Bear
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian get into a friendship-ending fight after Brian commits a terrible act to one of Stewie's beloved toys. Meanwhile, Peter refuses to wash his hand after meeting his favourite breakfast cereal mascot, Boo Berry.

programme.title: Family Guy: Send in Stewie, Please
programme.desc: Stewie gets sent to see his school's child psychologist, Dr. Cecil Pritchfield, for a surprising session, which causes Stewie to reveal major, never-before-told secrets about himself.

programme.title: Family Guy: V Is for Mystery
programme.desc: In a special Dickensian-themed episode, Stewie and Brian are detectives who embark on solving a string of mysterious murders set in Victorian-era London.

programme.title: Family Guy: Veteran Guy

programme.title: Family Guy: The Woof of Wall Street
programme.desc: Brian convinces Stewie to teach him how to invest in the stock market after learning Stewie has a knack for making money from it. Meanwhile, Peter, Quagmire, Cleveland and Joe look after the Drunken Clam while Jerome is away.

programme.title: Family Guy: The D in Apartment 23
programme.desc: When Brian posts an offensive tweet that goes viral and the rest of the Griffins are also treated as outcasts, he's forced to move out of the Griffin house.

programme.title: Family Guy: Petey IV

programme.title: Family Guy: Crimes and Meg's Demeanor
programme.desc: Peter encourages Meg to attend a high school party, where she takes up drinking, which both concerns and delights her father. Meanwhile, Brian begins spying on his neighbors and suspects Principal Shepherd of a crime.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Can't Bite Me Love
programme.desc: A parakeet narrowly escapes a cat attack and a newborn bunny fights for its life.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Oui, Oui... Piggie!
programme.desc: A duck with a rusty hook in his foot rushes in, a very sick ferret presents losing weight at an alarming rate and a rabbit with a severely twisted neck has her owners in a panic, all while a pretty pig gets a pedicure.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Temple of Terror
programme.desc: A mysterious explosion rocks the streets in Cambodia and it may be linked to a temple complex. Motorcyclists encounter what may be a legendary humanoid cannibal, and a cursed mineshaft could explain paranormal activity in a town's antique center.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Zombie Reindeer Invasion
programme.desc: Aerial images capture a mound of over 300 dead reindeer in the mountains of Norway and their bodies mysteriously bare no signs of violence; experts investigate and reveal they may have fallen victim to a centuries-old disease released from the icy tundra.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Riddle in the Ruins
programme.desc: Strange black holes appear near Egypt's ancient pyramids, and new evidence points to a disturbing conclusion. Ruins in Peru suggests that the Inca people knew far more than previously thought. A mysterious red swarm invades a beach in India.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include the face of Christ is found in a field in Hungary, a photo that claims to show who shot down a passenger jet in Ukraine and a sinister shape in the mountains of Afghanistan that leads investigators to a hidden genocide.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dawn of Life
programme.desc: We're on the verge of uncovering the how life on Earth came to be. Our origin is a hotly contested scientific debate.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of Seahenge
programme.desc: A prehistoric megastructure emerges from the sands of an English shore that could reveal lost mysteries to the Bronze Age; using pioneering technology and 3-D imaging analysis, experts investigate and uncover dark, ancient rituals once performed here.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Zombietown USA
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of an abandoned town hidden in the American wilderness, and as experts analyze this new evidence, they reveal what this strange place has to do with a top-secret military plan to battle an army of the undead.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: A Darker Shade of Blue
programme.desc: Chaos ensues in Fox Lake, Illinois when an officer is found dead. With a potential cop killer on the loose, the town is on lockdown. But when sordid details of the dead officer's secret life come out, the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Missing in Alaska
programme.desc: Mike Dixiano is heartbroken when his wife Angela Dixiano dies from organ failure after a lifelong battle with drugs and alcohol. Friends and family grieve her death, but when investigators can't find a death certificate, her husband comes under scrutiny.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Mastermind
programme.desc: LAPD investigators are on the hunt for a criminal stealing expensive yachts, but what they find instead is a mild mannered man among their own ranks… who's involved in a lot more than just boat theft.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fear the Ether Man
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as the Ether Man lurks in the shadows of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Victims can't identify the masked attacker and worse still, it looks like he's expanding his hunting grounds.

programme.title: An Affair to Die For
programme.desc: A forbidden affair between a young female soldier and her married commanding officer reaches a boiling point after they are deployed to Iraq.

programme.title: Exes and Alibis
programme.desc: When a woman and her boyfriend are found dead in his Houston apartment, a laundry list of suspects must be eliminated before this crime can be solved.

programme.title: A Toxic Valentine
programme.desc: A mother-daughter duo with questionable taste in men find themselves locked in a deadly game of love and war.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Recipe for Death
programme.desc: Eric gives up the Marines to follow his dream as a baker, and believes he's found the sweetest confection possible when he falls for Constance on a blind date. These foodies indulge in the good life until a seven-year itch is scratched by murder.

programme.title: Exes and Alibis
programme.desc: When a woman and her boyfriend are found dead in his Houston apartment, a laundry list of suspects must be eliminated before this crime can be solved.

programme.title: A Toxic Valentine
programme.desc: A mother-daughter duo with questionable taste in men find themselves locked in a deadly game of love and war.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Recipe for Death

programme.title: An Affair to Die For
programme.desc: A forbidden affair between a young female soldier and her married commanding officer reaches a boiling point after they are deployed to Iraq.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: History of Violence
programme.desc: 50-year-old Edwardyne Williams' body is discovered in the woods and at first it appears to be a random act of violence. But as police dig deeper, they discover that the killer is someone who has been harboring a grudge against her for years.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Murder in the Poconos
programme.desc: Benjamin Amato and Cheryl Kunkle's May-December becomes complicated when Cheryl becomes pregnant with the couple's child. The former lovers are soon at war in court. But the day before their final custody hearing, a murder changes everything.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love and Dishonor
programme.desc: When Montreal teen Zainab Shafia meets Ammar Wahid, it's love at first sight. But their relationship is forbidden by her strict father and he'll stop at nothing to ensure his daughter obeys his rules of honor.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Million Dollar Christy
programme.desc: A female boxing Phenom enters a forbidden relationship with her trainer. But when another secret passion bubbles to the surface and she tries to leave his controlling grip, she finds herself fighting for her life.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Behind Bars
programme.desc: An inmate in a West Virginia jail finds love in a hopeless place with a guard, but their love comes at a tragic cost.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Shame of the Father
programme.desc: Two teenagers play with fire by entering into a secret relationship against a father intent on ending their storybook romance.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Broken Dreams
programme.desc: The only thing going for Christina Corrigan is Keith Belajonas, a cute 25-year-old she meets online. After a couple of years and kids, they marry. But the honeymoon won't last long, and the jagged edges of their broken dreams will lead to a blood bath.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Rookie Mistake
programme.desc: Carli wants to be a cop instead, she marries one. And Jeff takes his role as protector a little more seriously than fun-loving Carli can handle. Her attempts to break free from the confines of wedlock sets off a chain of deadly events.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: At Death's Door
programme.desc: Lynn and Manfred Schockner are millionaire executives at an aerospace engineering company. But underneath their privilege and wealth lies a twisted rage that ends in a lethal conspiracy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Not in Kansas Anymore
programme.desc: Kelly and Punkie are teenagers in love. They marry almost as soon as the law will allow, and plan to raise children in rural Kansas. But things take a deadly turn when they befriend Tammy and Jerry, a sexually adventurous couple with a need for speed.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Blood and Sand
programme.desc: California beauty Pegye meets ace volleyball player Eric on the pristine sands of Newport Beach. With good looks and success they look like they've got it all but hedonism comes at a price, and living the dream quickly becomes a waking nightmare.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Sex, Lies, and Secret Texts
programme.desc: Cassie is a free-spirited bartender when she meets family-guy Brent - the rock to her roll. But a spark this intense is doomed to explode... and a bright light extinguishes in tragedy.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: The Mob Rat: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco: The Informant
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions, and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: Mafia's Killing Machine: The DeMeo Crew
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: The Mob Rat: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wolf Lake Escape
programme.desc: New parents look to escape their busy New York City lives with a move to Wolf Lake, a small, rustic lake community in upstate New York. The properties they consider require significant renovations and may break the bank.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Jackson Lake Remake
programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy lives in Atlanta with a vacation home on Jackson Lake, Georgia. They find the ideal property for their blended family, including three kids, but face a growing renovation list on a tight budget.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Second Generation Renovation on Georgia's Lake Arrowhead
programme.desc: Lisa and Angela are co-workers and friends that are searching for a house on Lake Arrowhead in Georgia. With the help of their daughters Danielle and Allie, they're hoping to find the perfect vacation home to share between their two growing families.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb are building an ATV powerful enough to handle extreme terrains and even buildings. Meanwhile, Candace and Stacy go to a leadership retreat where Candace learns the steps needed to achieve her ultimate goal of busting her brothers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: She's the Mayor/ The Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: While Candace and Stacy's relationship is put to the test, Phineas and Ferb build the ultimate lemonade stand and begin to offer franchise opportunities. Candace is awarded the opportunity to be mayor for the day, which she uses to her advantage.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Make Play/ Candace Gets Busted
programme.desc: Candace switches places with a princess who looks just like her, but the ongoing antics of Phineas and Ferb prevent her from enjoying the royal luxuries. Then, Candace inadvertently hosts a giant party while Linda and Lawrence are away on a trip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Hide and Seek/ That Sinking Feeling
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb shrink their friends while playing hide and seek.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What Do It Do?/ Atlantis
programme.desc: Candace thinks she finally has a strange device to show Mom and bust Phineas and Ferb when Agent P knocks Dr. Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' into the boys' front yard. Phineas and Ferb then reconstruct the device to find out what it does.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Get That Bigfoot Outa My Face!/ Tree to Get Ready
programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Chronicles of Meap
programme.desc: Space pod crashes carrying an unbearable cute alien, Meap; another adventure begins.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Meapless in Seattle
programme.desc: Meap returns to save Phineas and Ferb from his nemesis Mitch, whose real mission is to take control of all of alien-kind, putting Meap's world in danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Save Summer
programme.desc: Phineas, Ferb and the gang host a global concert – just as Doof's latest '-inator' invention moves Earth, putting summer in jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Belly of the Beast/ Moon Farm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: World of X Games: X Games Aspen 2021 Anthology

programme.title: Sesame Street: Searching for Letter Y
programme.desc: This award-winning children's series provides education and enrichment for preschoolers.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Peterrific/ Mother's Day Surprise

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Masterclass Three

programme.title: Finding Your Roots: The Shirts on Their Backs

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: Benson and Murphy investigate a television producer who is accused of molesting his child. His estranged wife wants justice for their child but refuses to co-operate with the investigation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Forgiving Rollins
programme.desc: Atlanta's Deputy Chief, Charles Patton, and his newest detective, Reese Taymor, visit New York for a law enforcement conference. When Reese is found unconscious in her hotel room, she cries rape at the scene but changes her story soon afterwards.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Catfishing Teacher
programme.desc: A high school student plans a clandestine hookup with his female teacher but ends up in a far more sinister situation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Next Chapter

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Chasing Theo
programme.desc: A young boy goes missing in the middle of a wild drug-fuelled party thrown by his mother. With the child's life on the line the case causes Benson to scrutinize her own role as a mother.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Plastic
programme.desc: A woman accuses a celebrity plastic surgeon and his girlfriend of rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: I'm Going to Make You a Star
programme.desc: When an actress accuses a high powered media mogul of attempted rape, Benson finds herself in a high stakes game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Modern Family: My Funky Valentine

programme.title: Modern Family: Heart Broken
programme.desc: A fun Valentine's Day romp between Phil and Claire's alter egos, Clive Bixby and Juliana, takes an unexpected turn that lands Claire in the hospital and with a diagnosis that she doesn't take lying down.

programme.title: Modern Family: Valentine's Day 4: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Jay goes from feeling disappointed to scared when Gloria's visiting sister, Sonia, becomes a large deterrence for a romantic evening with Gloria. Then, Mitchell and Cameron get themselves in a very precarious situation with their good friend Anders.

programme.title: Modern Family: Do You Believe in Magic?
programme.desc: Fearful that the romance between him and Claire is fizzling, Phil calls upon his alter ego, Clive Bixby, to get Valentine’s Day back on track. Jay and Gloria must deal with Joe's inappropriate Valentine gift-giving and Manny's dating indecisiveness.

programme.title: Modern Family: We Need to Talk About Lily

programme.title: The Rev: Knit It to Win It

programme.desc: The team finishes the 1969 Plymouth Satellite after flaring tempers that lead to a blow-up between Tom & Thomas. Afterwards they bond together at the Gas Monkey Bar & Grill, taking inspiration in the house that Richard Rawlings built.

programme.desc: Tom and Thomas buy a '71 Pontiac GTO, but realize it's not worth rebuilding. Thomas visits the Gas Monkey Garage for a new car but comes up empty and makes a deal on a '41 Ford from a friend instead. Heavy machinery is brought in to deal with the GTO.

programme.title: Misfit Garage: Crushed GTO and Chopped '41 Ford, Part 2
programme.desc: The team teaches Thomas a lesson by taking the 1971 GTO to a field and crushing it with a tank. Thomas buys a 1941 Ford to turn it into a flaming blue hot rod as well as a food truck to kick start the dream of a Fired Up Garage empire.

programme.title: Misfit Garage: '57 Corvette, Part 1
programme.desc: Thomas Weeks and Tom Smith get a'57 Corvette for a bargain and help Sue Yu-Lan Martin purchase a '56 Ford Truck that the 'Fired Up Garage' will rebuild. Tom's food truck arrives and Soup Bone drops the ball on parts as a new team member is brought on.

programme.title: Misfit Garage: '57 Corvette, Part 2

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ramshackle Rambler

programme.title: I Am Jazz: Re-evaluation Realness

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A Taste of Season 1
programme.desc: Sisters Amy and Tammy weigh over 1,000 pounds combined, and they must each lose significant weight to be eligible for bariatric surgery. After months of hard work, Amy gets approved while Tammy is rejected. Both sisters have astounding transformations.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Life-Altering News
programme.desc: While Amy reaps the benefits of weight-loss surgery, her sister Tammy worries that she gained weight during quarantine. A visit to urgent care gives Amy life-changing news. Tammy's family confronts her over her health.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Tippin' the Scales

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wake-Up Call

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A Fork in the Road

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Dropping Bombs

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Bobby Lee

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Blunder Years
programme.desc: The guys try to justify getting humiliated at a convenience store, they give conflicting info about their event planning companies at a wedding expo and the loser awkwardly meets his celebrity childhood crush: Danica McKellar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dream Crusher
programme.desc: The guys try to kiss unsuspecting strangers until a special guest crashes the party, they focus-group their absurd life stories as potential movies, and the big loser gets a room-full of enemies while judging a kids' talent show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Bobby Lee
programme.desc: The three chefs make recreations of McDonald's Sausage McMuffin with egg for Bobby Lee.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Joel McHale
programme.desc: Three chefs tackle the recreation of the Chicago red hot, then head to the remix round where they'll put a haute cuisine spin on the hot dog classic. Only one chef will walk away with the Championship trophy, and Joel's love and approval.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Invent a Dish Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe show off their artistic abilities as they dine, and get Mariano Rivera to judge their works. Plus, Q flips a doubloon to determine if there will be another season.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Spaghetti and Meatballs Episode
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: You've Got Fail
programme.desc: Find out why a boy regrets his first kiss.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: All Flubbed Up
programme.desc: Watch a woman with seemingly magical powers disrupt an ordinary coffee shop.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Zero Donut Thirty
programme.desc: This episode includes a horrifying Halloween mask removal, a couple attacking a hornet's nest and an impossible task: getting the good donuts out of the conference room without being noticed.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: The Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Anniversary Edition
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q, and Murr celebrate three years of embarrassing each other on this special anniversary edition. The guys reveal some never-before-seen bonus footage of their favorite moments from the vault.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Jokers Playhouse
programme.desc: The guys have to keep a straight face as the other Jokers act out bizarre scenes, and then they try to get an embarrassing word in edgewise with strangers at the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: The guys bite off more than they can chew serving customers at a sub shop, and they team up at a food court to perform a mystery task based on ambiguous hints from their partner.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr feel the wrath of disapproving focus groups after nonsensical presentations, and try to reach out and touch strangers at the mall with anything but their hands. Plus, the guys must quit their job in front of a crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Good, the Bad and the Uncomfortable
programme.desc: The guys talk ticks, tricks and antics. Plus, see the Jokers’ best bloopers and learn all about their annoying habits that aren’t captured on camera.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Anatomy of a Challenge
programme.desc: A look back on the series' best challenges and behind-the-scenes secrets.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Unseen Scenes
programme.desc: The guys unveil all the hilarity that was left on the cutting room floor.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: All Aboard!
programme.desc: For every hilarious, awkward and uncomfortable moment featured in episodes of Impractical Jokers, there are plenty of other great moments that end up on the cutting room floor. The guys share never-before-seen footage from seasons past.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: A Day in the Life
programme.desc: A documentary crew gets access to the cast and crew of the popular hidden camera series. This inside look unveils things like how the show is made, what it's like to be the Jokers, as well as what happens when the guys reveal marks are on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.
