programme.title: Modern Family: Pilot
programme.desc: A satirical look at three different families and the trials they deal with in life.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Bicycle Thief
programme.desc: Phil is determined to help Luke prove to his mom that he is responsible enough to have the brand new bike they just got him. However, Phil ends up being the irresponsible one when a hot neighbour clouds his judgment.

programme.title: Modern Family: Come Fly With Me
programme.desc: After some nudging, Jay begrudgingly takes Phil out to fly his new model airplane, but a manoeuvre goes awry. Meanwhile, when Gloria drops Manny off to play with Luke, she ends up volunteering to take Alex dress shopping.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Incident
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchell's mother drops in for a surprise visit, determined to make amends with everyone she offended during what has been deemed 'The Incident' at Jay and Gloria's wedding. No one is happy to see her, and it all comes to a head at dinner.

programme.title: Modern Family: Coal Digger
programme.desc: The whole family is invited to Jay and Gloria's for a barbecue and football. However, an earlier incident at school between Manny and Luke makes things very awkward for Gloria and Claire, and things escalate when a not-so-flattering label is uttered.

programme.title: Modern Family: Run for Your Wife
programme.desc: As the kids head back to school, Phil oversteps when he misreads how Claire is coping with an empty nest. Over at Jay's, he and Gloria are in disagreement over Manny's interesting choice of outfit for his first day of class.

programme.title: Modern Family: En Garde
programme.desc: The family turns out to support Manny in a fencing tournament, which ignites everyone's competitive spirit. Meanwhile, Phil is determined to find where Luke's hidden talents lie.

programme.title: Modern Family: Great Expectations
programme.desc: With a history of giving bad anniversary gifts, Claire is determined to finally surprise Phil with an amazing one. Meanwhile, Mitchell and Cameron call up their party-girl for a long overdue night out on the town.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fizbo
programme.desc: Phil and Claire decide to throw Luke the biggest and best birthday party, but when Cameron shows up as Fizbo the Clown, it sets off a chain of events that ends with someone in the hospital.

programme.title: Modern Family: Undeck the Halls
programme.desc: Christmas is in full swing at the Dunphy house until the kids get in some trouble and Phil and Claire threaten to take away Christmas until one of them fesses up.

programme.title: Modern Family: Up All Night
programme.desc: Gloria is less than pleased with Jay's reaction to the arrival of Javier, Manny's infamously unreliable dad. Meanwhile, Phil is suffering from kidney stones, and his dramatics lead Claire to call for hot firefighters to take him to the hospital.

programme.title: Modern Family: Not in My House
programme.desc: Claire finds a dirty picture on the computer and assumes it's Luke's. Jay and Gloria disagree over his beloved life-sized dog butler statue, and Cameron gets sucked into their gardener's woes.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fifteen Percent
programme.desc: Mitchell plants the seed in Jay's head that he thinks one of Jay's old buddies, Shorty, might be secretly gay. Meanwhile, Gloria gives Manny's date a makeover, and Claire faces off with Phil's universal remote.

programme.title: Modern Family: Moon Landing
programme.desc: Claire feels slightly inadequate when her old friend Valerie visits and is nothing like Claire remembered. Meanwhile, Jay has an unsettling locker-room moment when he and Cameron go play racquetball.

programme.title: Modern Family: My Funky Valentine
programme.desc: Phil and Claire break from their traditional Valentine's Day dinner date and plan a little roleplay excursion. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria's ideas of romance clash when he takes her to a comedy show, and Mitchell and Cameron play Cupid for Manny.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fears
programme.desc: When Phil and Luke embark on a discovery expedition underneath the house, Phil tries not to let his fear of the dark and creepy-crawlies get the best of him. Meanwhile, Claire takes a nervous Haley to the DMV for her driver's test.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Family Food Feud
programme.desc: Two families are going head-to-head in the market in the ultimate Family Food Feud, worth up to $20,000. First, one member of each family must prepare their best pork dish using a grocery list of the Fieri family's favourites ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Cheat Day
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites four chefs to participate in Flavortown's first Cheat Day, challenging them to make dishes worth splurging on after a week of eating three square meals and exercising every day.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Superfans
programme.desc: They've seen every episode and know every twist, and now three of GGG's biggest superfans get to play their favourite Flavortown games. Luckily, their favourite GGG judges, Beau MacMillan, Damaris Phillips and Aarti Sequeira, are on hand to mentor them.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: One-Time Aisle Games
programme.desc: In Flavortown, chefs usually have free reign of the entire market – but tonight, that's all changing when Guy has the chefs cooking meals all night long… but can only shop each aisle ONCE.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: High-End at Home
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son Hunter send three chefs boxes of the market's finest foods, plus a scale to weigh the mere 7 pounds of ingredients they can actually use. The chefs also have to combine high-end and bargain-basement flavors in a modern 5-star dinner.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Bonkers for Baked Goods
programme.desc: The recruits get a crash course in cake decorating from pastry chef Zac Young and then have to decorate cupcakes. In the main challenge, they return to the savory side as they're asked to make fresh pasta from scratch.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Forecasting a Win
programme.desc: America's favorite weatherman, Al Roker, joins Food Network's Katie Lee to bring a torrential downpour on Bobby Flay's day. Chefs Maris Grubb and Justin Walker will be cooking up a storm to try to rain on Bobby's parade.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sweet, Sweet Revenge!
programme.desc: Brooklyn pastry chefs Clarice Lam and Caroline Schiff are back in the kitchen for revenge after Bobby Flay beat them with something sweet. Michael Symon and Josh Capon judge.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Bobby Flay may have co-starred with her on "Entourage," but tonight Perrey Reeves is co-starring with "Chopped" vet Scott Conant to tarnish Bobby's record.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: So Many Obstacles
programme.desc: Chef Anne Burrell and Olympian Apolo Ohno are going for the gold as they pit Italian chef Michele Castelli against New England chef Brian Miller. It's up to them to pick the strongest culinary athlete they think can torch Bobby Flay!

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Party in the Sky

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Game wardens enforce the law across Texas. A hunting club has a trespassing issue. People are caught attempting to illegally cross the Rio Grande. An argument between neighbors is mediated. Fishermen receive citations on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deadly Conduct

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Garage Gator
programme.desc: In Liberty County, Game Warden Jake Noxon investigates a family for illegally keeping a pet deer, and farther south an alligator roams a garage. Game Warden Mike Boone joins forces with local police to track down armed suspects after a robbery.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Lake Showdown
programme.desc: When a drunken man wreaks havoc on Sam Rayburn Lake, Game Wardens Randy Sovall and Sean Reneau deal with the aftermath. Game Warden Mike Boone tracks down the culprits responsible for an illegal dumpsite, and hooks a gator residing in a family's pond.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confessions of a Poacher
programme.desc: Warden Richards confronts a suspected poacher for illegally hunting ducks and geese. Wardens Ben and Chelsea Bailey monitor an injured deer running along a busy highway, and a man is arrested after confessing to poaching a deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trespassers Beware
programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Lake Showdown
programme.desc: When a drunken man wreaks havoc on Sam Rayburn Lake, Game Wardens Randy Sovall and Sean Reneau deal with the aftermath. Game Warden Mike Boone tracks down the culprits responsible for an illegal dumpsite, and hooks a gator residing in a family's pond.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Garage Gator
programme.desc: In Liberty County, Game Warden Jake Noxon investigates a family for illegally keeping a pet deer, and farther south an alligator roams a garage. Game Warden Mike Boone joins forces with local police to track down armed suspects after a robbery.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens go undercover to stop a black market for buying and selling wild animals. A trio of Wardens work the beaches of Galveston and mobilize when an oil spill threatens wildlife. A robotic deer decoy is used to catch night hunters.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Old Warrants Die Hard
programme.desc: A game warden has a run-in with an acrobatic squirrel. A Mexican shrimp boat may have an illegal catch. Fishing without a license leads to a trip to jail. A mystery UTV caught-on-tape has a surprising driver. Some kids are found in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Thrill of the Hunt
programme.desc: A tense confrontation ensues when Wardens Scott and Gould respond to a call about an illegal deer hunting case. A pair of raccoons find their way to a gas station and must be trapped, and Warden Boone handles a disgruntled hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparks Flying
programme.desc: During the holiday weekend a jet skier is reported missing, while another is caught without a life vest. Warden Kiel witnesses a fist fight during the fireworks, and warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Winter Is Here
programme.desc: As the first snow falls, the Brown Family makes a risky attempt to move their temporary shelters closer to the barn in hopes of bringing father Billy back home. Noah uses his ingenuity to prepare he and his pregnant wife Rhain Alisha for her first winter.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: King of the Mountain
programme.desc: With winter closing in, the Wolfpack races to build their homes before the ground begins to freeze. Later, a snowstorm threatens progress as they haul Bear's new house up to the highest peak on the mountain.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Wolfpack vs. the Wolf
programme.desc: The Brown family gets ready to defend themselves against dangerous new predator that's stalking their ranch.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Clear and Pheasant Danger
programme.desc: The Browns take part in a competitive pheasant hunt as a way to celebrate and give thanks for everything they have.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Fowl Weather Friends
programme.desc: Birdi goes on a treacherous hunt to bring home meat for the family and save her chickens from slaughter. Later, Noah constructs an automatic diaper machine and Gabe gets bush insight from Ami that he can pass along to Raquell.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Chaos Before the Storm
programme.desc: Winter is approaching yet the Wolfpack is feeling the heat! Bear works furiously to finalize an addition to his home as Billy faces a new medical crisis. A big winter storm forces Noah and Rhain Alisha to make a tough decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Big Push
programme.desc: The Brown siblings struggle to finish their ambitious homesites as the ground begins to freeze. Later, the Wolfpack gets the call that Rhain-Alisha has gone into labor and races to the birth of baby Eli.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wind and Water
programme.desc: The Brown Family kicks off their most ambitious plan to conquer the mountain yet. Bear and the siblings throw caution to the wind on a critical first project disassembling and transporting a salvaged 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bears of a Feather
programme.desc: When a hungry bear breaks into Noah's tent and spooks the livestock, the Browns suspect it is being attracted by the ranch's newest arrivals, three young ostriches. Later, the windmill assembly takes the siblings to dangerous new heights.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Storm's Fury

programme.title: Movie: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: When a ruthless sultan threatens the lives of his wife and son, a young prince is willing to go to great lengths to keep them safe. An encounter in a cave, high up in the mountain, turns him into the legendary vampire, Dracula.

programme.title: Movie: Twister

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Night of the Meek

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dust

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Continues

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Call and Response
programme.desc: After receiving a recording of an alleged Bigfoot call, Bryce blasts the howl over a speaker to elicit a response. With Russell positioned high on a hill and Ronny and Mireya down in the valley below, the team may get the encounter they're looking for.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Begins

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Did You Hear That?

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Nest
programme.desc: Russell stumbles upon a structure he believes is a Bigfoot nest. Ronny and Mireya race to the nest to collect DNA samples that could break open their investigation.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Red Eyes at Night
programme.desc: Mireya and Ronny make a powerful discovery in the area surrounding the nest. When Russell suddenly falls ill, Bryce tests the theory that Bigfoot can render humans sick by emoting infrasound and is doing this to keep the team out of its territory.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Iconic Haunts
programme.desc: We explore the mysteries and legends surrounding seven spine tingling sites. Gathering a team of ghost hunters, psychic mediums and historians we reveal why these paranormal hotspots deserve their reputation as the most terrifying places in America.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Dark Encounters
programme.desc: Dine with ghosts then party with the paranormal at a haunted nightclub. Head underground in Portland where unsuspecting folks were held captive and then hit up a haunted mansion and tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: In this hour of Most Terrifying Places in America, we keep crisscrossing the country to tour even more paranormal hotspots. We visit a castle outside of Seattle that is haunted by a suicidal monk, and an early American Inn near Boston.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Deadly Destinations
programme.desc: In this instalment of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we visit the deepest, darkest, haunted spots our country has to offer. We explore a bar in Chicago that contains forces so dark it causes visitors to turn horribly violent.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Hot Spots
programme.desc: In this hour of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we're touring more of the spookiest spots in the country! We visit a defunct amusement park that delivers a unique 'thrill', and a residence so haunted the owner rarely sleeps there!

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: History of Horror
programme.desc: In this hour, continue the search for places that'll make you scream. Stop by an old prison where ghosts of the country's worst violent offenders roam, and a Chicago home that inspired the legend of the Devil Baby.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Tour of Fright
programme.desc: Visit an Illinois cemetery and a theater in Cincinnati that was built over a mass grave.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Restless Dead
programme.desc: From a former Victorian-era asylum where victims were experimented on to a remote Nebraska outpost where a scorned woman killed her unfaithful husband, we explore the gravest of locations where the dead never sleep.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Chasing Nay-Nay
programme.desc: The ladies return to Atlanta from the Philippines and immediately get back to work. Kenya is in the midst of shooting her pilot, 'Life Twirls On,' as Cynthia strives to perfect her accent for the role as a Jamaican salon owner.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Atlanta Twirls On
programme.desc: Kandi makes a surprise announcement that startles not only her daughter, Riley, but Mama Joyce as well. As Peter and Cynthia say goodbye to Bar One, they receive a shocking phone call from Apollo in prison. Nene prepares for her debut on Broadway.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: The Giving Peach
programme.desc: Cynthia grapples with the decision of whether to invite her father to the wedding, knowing that her mother will disapprove. Kandi organizes a food drive to help provide groceries to local families in need.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: Watch with Quad and Dr. Simone: The Jet Set and the Upset
programme.desc: Follow women from Atlanta's social elite as they juggle their careers and home lives.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Atlanta: The Hostess with the Least-est
programme.desc: As the Isle of Palms girls’ trip continues, the drama between Marlo and Kenya reaches new heights. Porsha’s heart is still focused on how she can continue her activism as she struggles to cope with the verdict in the Breonna Taylor murder case.

programme.desc: A loving, single mother of two is the victim of a bizarre murder, leading detectives to investigate a number of suspects, until a killer with a dark obsession hiding in plain sight is revealed.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery on the Mississippi

programme.desc: An unconventional love story ends in murder when a mail-order bride disappears without a trace. Detectives discover that someone closest to her has a suspicious past, and only an exhumation can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Lovers' Lane Murders: No One Can Hear You Scream
programme.desc: After US Naval Academy graduate Cathy Thomas and her girlfriend Becky Dowski are murdered in a lovers' lane area on the Colonial Parkway in Virginia, authorities are left to wonder if this is a hate crime or the birth of something more ominous.

programme.title: Lovers' Lane Murders: Evil Strikes Again
programme.desc: With Cathy Thomas and Becky Dowski's Colonial Parkway homicide still unsolved, a new double murder less than a year later leaves law enforcement rattled. Are the slayings of David Knobling and Robin Edwards in another lovers' lane area connected?

programme.title: Lovers' Lane Murders: No Bodies, No Answers/ A Portrait of Evil
programme.desc: An entire region is on edge after college students Cassandra Hailey and Keith Call go missing from a lovers' lane area in Northern Virginia. Is this third double homicide on the Colonial Parkway an unnerving coincidence or proof of a serial killer?

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Driven to Murder

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Twisted Betrayal

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: With Cesar's UK holiday drawing to a close, he lends a hand to the rehabilitation of three British canines.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Fear Factor

programme.desc: Even the dead cold of a Michigan winter can't stop clients from coming into the Pol Veterinary Clinic.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Frostbitten in the Mitten
programme.desc: The deep freeze of late winter has everyone feeling the chill, but Dr. Pol won’t let the temperature stop him from taking on a new home improvement project.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: K-9 to 5
programme.desc: It is K9 chaos at Pol Veterinary Services.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of the Spy
programme.desc: A battle-scarred ruin in the Middle East is evidence of espionage that resulted in tremendous violence on a vast scale; experts expose the truth behind the strange building that holds the secrets of one of the world's most infamous deceptions.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Iceman Murder
programme.desc: A 5,000-year-old mummy perfectly preserved and frozen high in the Alps is one of the most monumental archaeological discoveries ever; now, experts use cutting-edge forensic tech to uncover clues to an ancient world far more sophisticated than imagined.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Mystery on Easter Island
programme.desc: Archaeologists have struggled for centuries to understand the ancient moai statues of Easter Island and the purpose behind their mysterious placement; now, experts use cutting-edge tech to finally reveal the hidden logic behind their cryptic locations.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: The Breakthrough
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard gain access to runestone samples for the forensic geologist to conduct testing, and they meet with an archaeo-physics team that finds metal artifacts buried at the site where the runestone was discovered.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Mystery on Easter Island
programme.desc: Archaeologists have struggled for centuries to understand the ancient moai statues of Easter Island and the purpose behind their mysterious placement; now, experts use cutting-edge tech to finally reveal the hidden logic behind their cryptic locations.

programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard gain access to runestone samples for the forensic geologist to conduct testing, and they meet with an archaeo-physics team that finds metal artifacts buried at the site where the runestone was discovered.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Iceman Murder
programme.desc: A 5,000-year-old mummy perfectly preserved and frozen high in the Alps is one of the most monumental archaeological discoveries ever; now, experts use cutting-edge forensic tech to uncover clues to an ancient world far more sophisticated than imagined.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Ghost Park
programme.desc: Deep in the wilderness of the American south, a long-abandoned amusement park is home to secrets of a forgotten, imaginary world. When experts investigate, they reveal why this bizarre place was built and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Mafia Island
programme.desc: A Mediterranean island paradise is not all that it seems; its complex of abandoned buildings were once prisons for the world's most dangerous Mafiosi; experts investigate new evidence to reveal who was imprisoned here and the secrets they left behind.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Doom of El Dorado
programme.desc: The haunting remnants of a settlement in the Nevada desert lies scattered with decaying machinery and remains trapped in a bizarre time-warp; experts uncover a forgotten mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Greatest Icons
programme.desc: Places that were once home to Hollywood films and world-famous musicians are now run-down, abandoned, and forbidden; experts investigate their mysteries and reveal the astonishing secrets behind ten of the world's most iconic abandoned places.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Rust Belt
programme.desc: A complex of tall, windowless buildings in the American Rust Belt hold the secrets to a lost empire of industry and wealth; experts investigate these mysterious structures to reveal why this once powerful metropolis is now home to abandoned ruins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Black Widow
programme.desc: When Cindy Taylor was a teen, her world was shattered by the sudden death of her father. Police said it was a heart attack, but years later Cindy would discover her father's death was just one of the deadly secrets her mother had been hiding from her.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: In the Lion's Cage
programme.desc: Linda Wittmier and Terry Jo Howard both fell in love with James Michael Randall. And both suffered when they discovered the monster that lurked inside him. But they never realized how lucky they were to survive his twisted sexual desire to kill.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: On the Run
programme.desc: When Susan Hamlin walks into a police station to confess that she is part of a satanic cult and plans to murder her husband, no one could guess that the truth is even more bizarre and sinister, or that it is all part of her own desperate escape plan.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Evil Undercover
programme.desc: When Lori McLeod fell for a man claiming to be an FBI agent, she felt certain that she would always be safe. Now, as the end of her life draws near, Lori is determined to ensure that the murderer who betrayed her family never becomes a free man.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: discovery+ 1st Look: What If He Was Innocent?
programme.desc: Some say Cameron Todd Willingham was wrongfully convicted, and the court put an innocent man to death. But Stacy Kuykendall knew Todd better than anyone, and she's convinced that he was a monster who was guilty as charged and deserved to die.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Now They Lay Me Down to Sleep
programme.desc: A death row inmate grants a final interview weeks before his execution. After a tragic house fire in Texas, suspicion lands on a husband and father when the brutally murdered bodies of his family are discovered in the ashes and he doesn't blink an eye.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Kentucky Thrill Ride
programme.desc: Mike and Elizabeth Turpin are the perfect couple. But when Elizabeth meets a mysterious woman with a disturbing secret she finds herself plunged into an out of control world of casual sex, drugs, steamy lesbian affairs, and ultimately- a shocking murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Man with Two Faces
programme.desc: Bloomington, Illinois Sergeant Jeff Pelo is a respected police officer. At home, he's a model father and husband. So when he's caught trespassing after midnight on a young woman's property, his spotless reputation comes under fire.

programme.title: Betrayed: Dying to be Popular
programme.desc: Becky Stowe is an eager 15-year-old looking for love. When she suddenly disappears, friends and family wonder if love finally found her, or if it was something far more sinister.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Bad To The Bone
programme.desc: These women are all 'bad to the bone,' so it's only a matter of time before they turn deadly.

programme.title: Web of Lies: New Year's Retribution
programme.desc: A newly single 33-year-old bursting with confidence after losing 200 pounds spends her time flirting with men online. When she fails to turn up for work one day, her friends worry that she didn't just run away with Mr. Right.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Marked for Murder
programme.desc: Friends and family are stunned when an esteemed criminal law professor and father of two, is executed in his garage. Investigators follow a series of leads that take them on a statewide hunt through Florida, in search of the murderous masterminds.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Hidden Clues
programme.desc: Two 20-year-olds suffer personal tragedies then have their own lives abruptly snuffed out. He's shot while hanging out with friends; she disappears, only to turn up dead in a staged suicide.

programme.title: True Conviction: Deception in the Desert
programme.desc: An unidentified young woman is found brutally murdered in the desert on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Guilt by Association
programme.desc: David Johnson tagged along with his brother to a New Year's Party. By the end of the night, one man was dead and David was a suspect. Now serving hard time, his family insists he was just a naïve teenager who was at the wrong place at the wrong time.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stalked
programme.desc: 26-year-old Florence Ballino is found dead in her apartment in an unusual condition. Her attacker deliberately left behind clues in an attempt to confuse investigators. Detective Postiglione identifies one clue that inextricably connects to the killer.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: When Good Meets Evil
programme.desc: John profiles Juan Lazaro Abrego, a man believed to have killed his ex-girlfriend, while Callahan investigates Derek Dean, a man accused of shooting a pair of identical twins, killing one and wounding the other.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A star athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The young man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life and the events of his last night on earth.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Wear a Pink Shirt
programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Dead Man's ID
programme.desc: Michael Hess is a wanted prison escapee on the run with a new identity and has been living in the same town he is wanted in for two decades. Hess learns to beat the system and enjoy his new life of work, weed and women before he's busted.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Boyfriend to Support
programme.desc: In jail for fraud, Steven Russell falls in love with inmate Philip Morris. When Morris is released, Russell is desperate to be reunited. He escapes from jail with elaborate cons. Once out, the two live a lavish life, supported by scams that alert the FBI.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got That Tough Girl Look
programme.desc: Juanita Liebman and two friends plan to rob a man at Biketoberfest in FL, but it goes wrong and the three kick him into a coma. Juanita tries to lay low, but her epilepsy requires medical attention. The cops stake out the pharmacy to apprehend her.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Plastic Surgery
programme.desc: Courtenay Savage is an ex-cop with a loaded gun aimed at a friend's trailer. She has no idea she is caught on tape. After an arrest and posting bail, she goes on the run, leaving ties to the police department and the sex industry.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Ninth Place at Poker
programme.desc: Randall Zandstra shot his ex-wife's boyfriend and got 12 years in jail. Due to a technicality, there was a retrial. Zandstra fled, ran to Vegas, winning big in poker and running mail fraud. Authorities finally track him down and he is now in a NJ prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Pen Pal
programme.desc: Brenda Wynn is out of prison, and wants a new life. But when a co-worker steels her money, she snaps and hits him with her car. Wynn does all she can to stay out of jail by using fake credit cards and conning men into giving her money.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Country Legend's Tour Bus
programme.desc: Christopher Gay is in jail for petty theft and known for his ability to escape. But on top of this, Gay is known for his choice in getaway vehicles. This cross-country chase is hardly a joy ride, as the cops are resolute on capturing him for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Bad Temper
programme.desc: In July, 2000 Aurlieas McClarty walks into a store and kills the manager for $200. Despite being a wanted man, McClarty doesn't keep a low profile. All McClarty wants is money, cars, drugs and women, and does anything to get them.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Bear Attack

programme.title: Building Alaska: Independence Day
programme.desc: Rich and his team race to stay ahead of the helicopter drops. It is unclear whether a new builder on Tom's site a friend or foe. And an eight point earthquake leaves Creig's build on shaky ground.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Getting Awkward
programme.desc: Rich's build is down to two workers which will make it tough to reach their milestones, nothing but wall-to-wall trouble may cause Tom's build to come tumbling down and Creig's build is fraught with costly miscalculations and tensions with Jim.

programme.title: Building Alaska: No Quit
programme.desc: While gale-force winds create danger for Tom's team, and rainy conditions threaten Creig's build, Sitka is nothing but sunny which provides the perfect conditions for Rich to have a whale of a good time.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Crunch Time

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey: See Saw/ Movies/ Grandad
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine's Day Mix-Up / A Stinky Story
programme.desc: When Ana's valentine is accidentally mailed to Italy, the Pugs must bring it back! The Pugs try to help a baby skunk find her way home without getting sprayed along the way.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: New Year, New Bob / All for Show
programme.desc: Bob and his family are in Hong Kong for the last day of Chinese New Year! Lollie’s competing in the local dog show, so the pugs mission is to help her become a champion.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Impossible Race/ The Happiest Helpers Cruise!
programme.desc: Cuckoo Loca enters her first Roadster event. Then, the happy helpers become cruise directors on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Junior Junior Fliers/ Good Vibrations
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must get their delivery back from precocious kid storks, Zed, Red, and Jed. Pip and Freddy become 'helicopter parents'.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Valentine Spirit / Shell Games
programme.desc: Freddy and Pip rush to deliver Valentines to the babies they've delivered to make it back in time for the Valentine's Day Party; Freddy, Pip and K.C. try to get a shy turtle out of her shell.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Learn to Tell Time
programme.desc: Tell time with the fab five as they rise and shine, enjoy daily meals, and get ready for bed.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine Surprise/ Bright Lights, Pup City
programme.desc: The pups look for Valentine's Day gifts for Bob and Chloe; Bob is sad when the Symphony of Lights is canceled, so the pups try to fix the lights.

programme.title: Bluey: Library/ Swim School/ Bin Night
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: A Surprise for Minnie

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Sled Pup/ Baby Boogie
programme.desc: With Freddy unable to fly, baby Husky Hazel, pulls them sled-style to her delivery! Penelope, the baby platypus has a special way of dancing.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Adopt-a-Palooza/ The Legend of Captain Wunderbark
programme.desc: When a puppy gets lost at Adopt-A-Palooza, it's up to the pugs, Keia and their new friend to find it. Bingo, Rolly and Keia go off in search of Captain Wunderbark's long-lost ship.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: My Bobby Valentine/ Musical Mission Mishap
programme.desc: Ana is excited to give Bob his favorite candy for Valentine's Day, but when every store is sold out, Bingo and Rolly must track down the special holiday treat. Bob surprises Ana by winning a walk-on role in 'Pups: The Musical!'

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine Surprise/ Bright Lights, Pup City
programme.desc: The pups look for Valentine's Day gifts for Bob and Chloe; Bob is sad when the Symphony of Lights is canceled, so the pups try to fix the lights.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Quest/ Llama Drama
programme.desc: Goofy and Donald team up with Uncle Goof to treasure hunt in Peru. The Happy Helpers discover the only way to deliver a package is to travel by llama up a mountain!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Guru Goofy/ Bed, Breakfast and Bungled!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Enough Stuff! / The Hippity Hop Horse Show!
programme.desc: Minnie suggests that Mickey give some of his hot dog-shaped collectibles away. Penelope gets jealous when Minnie practices with Cassidy for the horse show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Old McMickey Had a Farm/ Happy Lab Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang renovate a rundown farm! When the professor calls the Happy Helpers to watch his lab while he's away, they are given very important instructions!

programme.desc: Goofy wishes he could be a super-hero so that he can help out his friends.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: The Golden Boo-Boo

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Space Adventure
programme.desc: Mickey, Minnie, Donald, Daisy, Goofy and Pluto blast off to outer space in the Clubhouse rocket in search of treasure stars that will lead them to an out of this world surprise.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Pirate Adventure
programme.desc: Mickey and pals are enjoying a day at the beach when Peg Leg Pete delivers a note from Goofy's long lost Grandpappy, Captain Goof-Beard, asking for the gang's help in ensuring that Harmony-Chord Island doesn't go out of tune and sink.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Quest for the Crystal Mickey!
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse and his friends teach important skills through their adventures.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Ayati's Big Birthday/ A New Best T
programme.desc: Explore the world with dinosaur friends in search of the biggest dino of them all!

programme.title: Bluey: Bus / Mum School / Piggyback
programme.desc: The Heelers play a game of 'Bus'. Mum and Bluey play 'Mum School' where Mum teaches Bluey how to corral her rowdy kids. Bingo decides she’s too tired to walk and needs a piggyback.

programme.title: Bluey: See Saw/ Movies/ Grandad
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Clarabelle's Clubhouse Carnival
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends put on a fun carnival.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Pet Project
programme.desc: Daisy ends up with three pets for the Pet Parade, a baby elephant, giraffe and a bunny.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat
programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Clover's Tiny Problem/ Tango's BFF
programme.desc: Clover realizes Min won't replace him with any dinosaur. Then, Tango becomes attached to a triceratops and doesn't want her to rejoin her herd.

programme.title: Bluey: The Show/ Ticklecrabs/ Escape
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey put on a Mother's Day show! The kids play Tickle Crabs with Dad! Bluey and Bingo get dropped off at Nana's.

programme.title: Bluey: Rug Island/ Hairdressers/ Sticky Gecko
programme.desc: Dad washes up on the beach of a desert island. Hairdressers Bluey and Bingo discover that their customer has nits! Bluey and Bingo wait for a rubber gecko to fall from the ceiling!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: ARF's Robot Wish / Missing Collar Mission
programme.desc: When ARF wishes that he had a brother, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to help him find a robot sibling. When Bingo and Rolly's collar accidentally gets mailed to Bonnie in Africa, the pugs go on a mission to get them back.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: What to Expect When You're Egg-specting/ Ruffin' It
programme.desc: While in New Zealand, the pugs try to return a large egg before it hatches. When Chloe and Keia lose a special canoe paddle, the pups embark on a wilderness adventure to find it.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: The Long Way Home/ Trade in the Shade
programme.desc: A shortcut turns out to not be shorter. Then, the gang learns why they should care about the needs of others.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Small Wonder/ Dino Check-up Hiccup
programme.desc: The Cassidy family lives in a world with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pups in the Apple / Won't You Be My Puppy
programme.desc: On the morning of the Playcare bake sale, Bob is devastated when he can't make his "Big Apple" pie because he's out of apples. Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find their favorite television host's special sweater in time for his show.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: Henry Danger: One Henry, Three Girls
programme.desc: When girlfriends from past and present collide, Henry is forced to make a decision about his romantic life.

programme.title: Danger Force: Villains' Night
programme.desc: Danger Force and Captain Man go undercover as bad guys to catch a criminal.

programme.title: Danger Force: Ray Goes Cray
programme.desc: Two students keep Danger Force from going on missions, so Danger Force and Captain Man must use their powers to get the students to leave.

programme.title: The Loud House: Teacher's Union/ Head Poet's Anxiety
programme.desc: To try and make gym class better, Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up. Luan mentors Lucy teaching her how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: The Loud House: Deal Me Out/ Friendzy
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy. Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: The Loud House: Pasture Bedtime/ Shop Girl
programme.desc: The boys struggle with whether to attend Liam's barn sleepover or Girl Jordan's awesome pool party.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Two of Clubs/ Vacation Daze
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ Croaked
programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubblestand/ Ripped Pants
programme.desc: The art of bubble blowing; Bob rips his pants at Mussel Beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: Are You Afraid of the Dark?: The Tale of the Haunted Wood
programme.desc: The Midnight Society gathers around the campfire to tell each other spooky tales.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Sittin' for Sandy/ Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: One Coarse Meal/ Gary in Love
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs finds out that Plankton's afraid of whales. / Gary falls for a snail named Mary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jelly Fishing/ Plankton
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick take Squidward jelly fishing; Spongebob falls for Plankton's scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pizza Delivery/ Home Sweet Pineapple
programme.desc: Bob and Squid deliver Krabby Patty pizza; Bob loses his pineapple house to parasites.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Episode
programme.desc: Spongebob is jellyfishing when he realizes that he wants to fly with the jellyfish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cave Dwelling Sponge/ The Clam Whisperer
programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town, and only SpongeBob can communicate with him. A flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Big One
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are swept away by a giant wave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Pat go to a jellyfishing convention, SpongeBob tries to join an exclusive, elitist jellyfishing club. Secretly, the club president thinks SpongeBob is not worthy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for as long as anyone can remember, but Mr. Krabs explains that this wasn't always the case. Flashbacks reveal how their friendship went sour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongicus/ Suction Cup Symphony
programme.desc: Plankton builds a Roman coliseum, and puts on a free gladiator show featuring togas, chariots, and ferocious lionfish. / Squidward is determined to win the Bikini Bottom Symphony's composition contest, but SpongeBob and Patrick keep distracting him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tentacle-vision/ I Heart Dancing
programme.desc: Squidward gets a TV show. / SpongeBob has a dance audition.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Within the Woods
programme.desc: The team comes to grips with the possibility that Leo won't get better, while things only get worse: a new mutant captures Raph.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: A Foot Too Big
programme.desc: When the turtles encounter Bigfoot, they must protect him from a hunter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: When the team discovers a Kraang ship buried underneath April's house they also find her mom. As April reconnects with her mother they begin to wonder if she is all that she seems.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Croaking
programme.desc: An upset Mikey runs away from home and befriends a Mutant Frog in the woods. When he learns its Frog family plans to attack the human world, he has to figure out a way to stop them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Dream Beavers
programme.desc: Creatures that feed off dreams trap the Turtles in their own dreams as April and Casey must find a way to wake them up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Race With the Demon
programme.desc: Casey and Donnie bond over building Casey's new hot rod, but their newfound friendship is tested by Speed Demon, a hot-rodding mutant who is terrorizing the roads.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Eyes of the Chimera
programme.desc: When Casey, Raph, Mikey and Donnie are captured by a new mutant, both April and Leo must overcome disabilities in order to save them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Vision Quest
programme.desc: Leo takes the Turtles to train in the woods in an advanced ninja ritual where they must overcome their weaknesses and face their greatest enemies in order to become true ninja.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Return to New York
programme.desc: The turtles return to the city to search for Splinter, only to find that the city is overrun with Kraang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Serpent Hunt
programme.desc: As the turtles seach for Karai, they have to deal with a city filled with Kraangdroids as well as Zeck and Steranko, who hunt Karai for their own means.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Pig and the Rhino
programme.desc: Donnie finishes a new batch of retro-mutagen, hoping to save Karai, but the Turtles find themselves hunted by Shredder's new vengeful henchmen Bebop and Rocksteady.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Battle for New York
programme.desc: The Turtles brave the bizarre world of Dimension X to try and save the people of New York.

programme.title: Movie: Batman vs. Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The teenage mutant ninja turtles team up with Batman, Batgirl, and Robin when their enemy, The Shredder, teams up with Ra's Al Ghul.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Trans-Dimensional Turtles
programme.desc: The Turtles are transported to another dimension, where they meet their 80's alternative-reality counterparts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Wanted: Bebop and Rocksteady
programme.desc: When 80s Shredder and Krang appear in our dimension, they employ Bebop and Rocksteady and find their plans are succeeding better than ever.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Great Indoors/ Canderemy
programme.desc: Bad weather spoils Isabella's plan to earn a Fireside Girl patch, so Phineas and Ferb build a huge bio-dome to help her. Then, while Candace is visiting Jeremy, they are zapped by Dr. Doofenshmirtz's 'combine-inator,' literally joining them at the hip.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Split Personality/ Brain Drain
programme.desc: Candace accidentally gets hit by a 'splitter' ray which causes her to have two different personalities: Romantic Candace and Busting Candace. Then, Phineas and Ferb are sick with a cold, so they create a live television feed to their friends' homes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Delivery of Destiny/ Let's Bounce
programme.desc: Follow Paul the Delivery Man as he journeys through his usual stops.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Split Sword of Swanstantine!
programme.desc: The kids pair off to find the missing pieces of a mystical sword hidden throughout an Istanboar marketplace, unless F.O.W.L. gets to them first.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Cobra and Mongoose / Better Off Fred
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Parker Plays: The Return of the Parker
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Baymax Returns Part I and II
programme.desc: Join Hiro right after he learns that Baymax is lost in the portal forever. He discovers the chip that Tadashi designed to create Baymax. Hiro begins school as the new prodigy at San Fransokyo Institute of Technology and sets out to rebuild Baymax.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Roommates 2
programme.desc: Go Go and Honey Lemon quickly clash when they become roommates. Meanwhile, when a thief steals Honey Lemon’s chem-lab purse, it accidentally turns him into a monster.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muirahara Woods
programme.desc: Hiro, Fred, and Baymax follow the secretive Go Go into the mysterious Muirahara Woods where they get lost and, even worse, everything electronic strangely fails, including Baymax.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Killer App
programme.desc: Wasabi’s need for order clashes with Hiro’s chaotic work style when they collaborate on a school project. They must learn to respect and embrace their differences to save the day.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mr. Sparkles Loses His Sparkle
programme.desc: Mr. Sparkles, a deranged game show host, threatens Mochi, forcing Go Go to get over her fear of looking stupid in public to beat his crazy obstacles.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fan Friction
programme.desc: When Karmi starts posting fan fiction about Big Hero 6, depicting Hiro as her boyfriend, Hiro is embarrassed and wants her to stop.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Max
programme.desc: Hiro invents a tiny robot, Mini-Max, to supervise and be a sidekick to Fred while the rest of the team is in class.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Obake Yashiki
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Bot-Fighter
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Countdown to Catastrophe: Part 1
programme.desc: Hiro proposes fixing a failed Krei Tech prototype for an energy amplifier as his first semester project, but Professor Granville rejects his idea because it’s too dangerous.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Countdown to Catastrophe: Part 2
programme.desc: Hiro continues to ignore Professor Granville’s warnings and perfects his energy amplifier. Obake steals it from SFIT’s Open House and gains control of Baymax, who turns on Hiro.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Countdown to Catastrophe: Part 3
programme.desc: Baymax brings Hiro to Obake’s lair, where Obake reveals his plans to recreate the Great Catastrophe and wipe out San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout
programme.desc: Hiro's jealousy of Karmi's internship at Sycorax leads him to intern at Kreitech. Meanwhile, the rest of Big Hero 6 tries to deal with old foes, Noodle Burger Boy and Trina.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Hiro gets set up with 14-year-old Megan, leading him to wonder if he's missing out on a normal life. The team must deal with an upgraded High Voltage.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
programme.desc: Honey Lemon learns that she can return to her dorm, but Go Go realizes she doesn't want her to move out. The team looks to stop a secret underground racing league.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!
programme.desc: Hiro and Go Go accompany Krei to the woods to deal with Nedd Ludd, however they run into the monster of legend, the Hibagon, along the way.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Lie Detector
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 must continue to fight off a city overrun with monsters.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Karmi and Hiro team up to help treat someone with genetically engineered parasites.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Globby Within
programme.desc: Nega-Globby begins to take control of Globby’s body in order to cause chaos around the city turning Globby from adored hero to a wanted criminal overnight!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred the Fugitive
programme.desc: Fred's invisibility function on his suit glitches during patrol.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Major Blast
programme.desc: Fred is targeted when a new villain, Major Blast appears in the city.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Present
programme.desc: When Hiro finds a wrapped present in the closet, he assumes it's from Aunt Cass and takes it in order to figure out what it is. However, after a mix-up, the present becomes lost and Hiro enlists the Big Hero 6 team to track it down.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Legacies
programme.desc: Chief Cruz and the police get the upper hand in their battle with both villains and Big Hero 6 when they begin using Buddy Guardians, powerful new robots produced by Krei Tech.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Hyper-potamus Pizza-Party-torium
programme.desc: Hiro’s faith in his friends starts to fray when they show up late to a mission. Hiro and a short-handed Big Hero 6 must attempt to stop Noodle Burger Boy and his new sisters.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mayor for a Day/The Dog Craze of Summer
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Dustin to the Rescue
programme.desc: Fred turns to his son Dustin for help when he uncovers a giant overhanging boulder at The Trifecta on the side wall that threatens to kill any diver below it. But tensions run high once Dustin takes control of Fred's operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Depths of Despair
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys are close to a huge gold cleanup. Ryan faces his worst fears as he dives deeper than ever into a crumbling, narrow 14-foot hole. Carlos finally hits bedrock at Rockfall Ravine and reveals that this dive site could pay out huge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Ride or Die
programme.desc: With their richest site picked clean, Dustin and crew move upstream to 'The Chute' a promising, yet dangerous site with rapids stronger than ever. Fred and crew rethink their operation and adapt the rock drag method to a vertical lift system.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: A Special Kind of Crazy

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rookie Mistakes
programme.desc: Dozer Dave bets his life savings that he can unearth piles of gold from an abandoned mine using salvaged equipment and a team of amateur miners.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Paydirt Mystery

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Last Chance Cut
programme.desc: Dave's entire season comes down to the final 24 hours and a bold risk that threatens to shut down his operation and force him out of the gold game for good.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: American Whiskey

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Gin Craze
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make gin, a notorious spirit with medieval roots that is still prized in the backwoods today. Judged by legendary shiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one can earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Backwoods
programme.desc: Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, three of America's favorite moonshiners, Josh Owens, Mark Rogers and up-and-comer Daniel Maner compete to see who makes Appalachia's most authentic backwoods shine and win a rare jar of Popcorn Sutton's liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Mark vs. Digger vs. Tim
programme.desc: Tickle hosts as Appalachia's most notorious moonshiners go head-to-head in a moonshine distilling competition. Mark, Digger and Tim run their own secret recipes to be judged by the public to determine once and for all who makes the best shine.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Don't Sweat It!

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Leave It to Nevus
programme.desc: With pandemic safety protocols in place, Dr. Lee reopens her office. Monica has a large birthmark growing on the side of her face. Jackie has a melon-sized lump on the back of her shoulder. Reginald has large, rare growths on the back of his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Big Pop on Campus

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: The Buddy System

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: A Big Fat Ultimatum

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Weight-Loss Surgery

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Whitney Gets Her Groove Back

programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Movie: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Three downtrodden working stiffs decide to launch their own business, but a slick investor stops them in their tracks. They hatch a half-baked scheme to kidnap the investor's son and demand a ransom, with which they can reclaim their business.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here
programme.desc: Michael gives a confused woman the license to speed at the DMV, unclogs a 'crumby' toaster at a return counter, and blows the mind of a beach attendant with a scaly encounter from under the sea.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: The guys get liberal with lotion down at the shore, shop from other people's carts in a supermarket and try to scam their way to a free dish of yogurt.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Boardwalk of Shame

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: It's a Makeshifte
programme.desc: Find out why Michael had to get scorpion training, what animal the crew chased around a store and where Michael's favourite vacation spots are.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Might Be Trippin'
programme.desc: Find out which trick nearly wounded a delivery man, what illusion is difficult for even skilled magicians to pull off and why fans speculated the show was connected to the illuminati.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: 3D Galastical Morphin Ranging Power Tents
programme.desc: Find out what trick has Michael using an inhaler, and how the magic team surprises him during a trick. Also, find out the name of his pet tarantula, and his passions beyond magic.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Flash Melt
programme.desc: Find out which trick occurred when a location fell through at the lasts second, and how the producers dealt with screaming kids during a shoot day. Plus, find out who crossed paths with Michael months after being tricked.
